question: Will I make ARML TB?
textDescription: Resolves to whether or not I qualify for the ARML 2026 individual tiebreakers. (N/A if I for some reason don’t attend or my score gets voided.) Last year I scored 7 on ARML. Closes at the time I expect to wake up for ARML.
newsShortReason: Your previous ARML score of 7 may be insufficient for individual tiebreaker qualification.
newsKeyEvidence: ARML 2025 top individual score was 15 points. | Individual tiebreaker winners are typically those with perfect individual round scores. | Your previous score of 7 may not meet the threshold for qualification.
